InstallTizenSdb: The Tizen SDB is required but not found. Retrying to download.
FailedTizenSdb: Tizen SDB is required but could not be found and downloaded.
TvNameNotFound: TV Name could not be found...
TvDuidNotFound: TV duid could not be found...
IpWindowDescription: Please enter the device's IP address:
InvalidDeviceIp: Invalid device IP or device not found.
DeveloperModeRequired: Samsung TV is not in developer mode...
DeveloperIPMismatch: Samsung Developer mode IP doesn't match this devices local IP, do you wish to continue?
DeveloperIPReversed: IP is in reversed order on the TV, please re-enable developer mode and type your local IP in reversed order. (ex: 192.168.1.2 → 2.1.168.192)
DevNotReadyEnableDevMode: ⚠ TV detected, but Developer Mode is off. On the TV: open Apps, type 1 2 3 4 5, switch Developer Mode On, enter this PC's IP, restart the TV, then rescan.
DevNotReadyPowerCycle: ⚠ TV detected and Developer Mode is on, but its debug port isn't responding yet. Fully power-cycle the TV (unplug ~30s), then rescan.
DevNotReadyIpMismatch: ⚠ TV detected, but its Developer Mode IP doesn't match this PC. Re-enter this PC's IP in the TV's Developer Mode settings, power-cycle the TV, then rescan.
NoDevicesFoundRetry: No devices found, retry with virtual NIC?
RetySearchMsg: No TV's found, want to search again with virtual network cards included in the search?
alreadyInstalled: {0} is already installed and your TV doesn't allow replacing or removing it remotely over the network connection. Please delete {0} on the TV (open the app list, press and hold the app, choose Remove) and try again.
modiyConfigRequired: Jellyfin app needs a new app id!
deleteExistingFailed: Deleting the existing version failed. Please delete it manually...
deleteExistingNotAllowed: Deletion not allowed. Enable the setting to allow the tool to remove the existing app...
insufficientSpace: Your device has insufficient space, please remove some apps and try again...
AuthorMismatch: Author Certificate mismatch, please re-sign the package with correct certificate.
certificateMismatch: {0} is already installed with a different signing certificate, so your TV won't replace it in place — and this TV doesn't allow removing apps remotely over the network connection. Please delete {0} on the TV manually (open the Apps list, press and hold {0}, choose Remove), then install it again.
lblBasePathHint: Tip: Paste full URL (e.g., https://host.com/path/jellyfin) to auto-fill all fields
lblGitHubTokenHint: Optional. Prevents API rate limiting when fetching releases. Create one at GitHub > Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens.
lblManualDuidsHint: Optional, advanced. Pre-authorize other Samsung TVs by their DUID (one per line) so a single signing certificate covers them — fewer Samsung logins when installing to multiple TVs.
duidLimitReached: A signing certificate can cover at most {0} TVs; device IDs beyond that were left out.
lblCssHint: Enter custom CSS or use @import to load external themes
lblJellyThemesHint: Click a theme to insert it and auto-validate. Visit the GitHub repo for previews.
lblUserSelectionHint: Selected users will be configured during installation
lblInstalledPluginsHint: Supported plugins will be transpiled and patched into the TV build. Untick any you don't want.
UpdateApplyingMessage: The application will restart to complete the update.
UpdateInstallerManagedWindows: This version was installed by an installer. Update it through winget (winget upgrade) or download the latest installer below.
UpdateInstallerManagedLinux: This version was installed via a system package. Update it with your package manager (e.g. sudo apt upgrade) or download the latest package below.
UpdateInstallerManagedMac: This version was installed as an app bundle. Update it through Homebrew (brew upgrade) or download the latest .dmg below.
IncompatiblePackage: Package version not compatible with device.
IncompatiblePackageDetailed: Package version {0} not compatible with Tizen OS {1}
lblMdnsWarning: Warning: You are using an mDNS hostname (.local). Samsung TVs cannot reliably resolve .local addresses, which may cause the server to appear as "undefined" on your TV — especially after network interruptions. Use a direct IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.100) instead for a stable connection.
lblJellyfinOnlyNotice: These settings apply ONLY to the official Jellyfin client — they are not supported for Jellyfin forks or other apps.
lblTvAppHint: Add your channel name and m3u8 link. These are written into TVApp before installation.
lblNoChannels: No channels yet. Click "Add channel" to create one.
lblTvAppOnlyNotice: These settings apply ONLY to TVApp — they are written into the package before installation.
lblTvAppOblongIconHint: Use the wide 16:9 launcher icon. Enable this for older Tizen 5.5 TVs that show a stretched or cropped square icon.
lblLitefinOnlyNotice: These settings apply ONLY to Litefin — they are written into the package before installation.
catalogSubtitle: Everything you can install on your Samsung device
catalogNoThumbnail: This app has no thumbnail yet.
